overview.description: The Anydrus Advantage ETF (NDOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed asset allocation fund that seeks capital appreciation and income by holding a broad portfolio of various asset classes from around the world, including ETFs. NDOW was launched on May 14, 2024 and is issued by Anydrus.
